sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The blue blob is still there at rows 51-59 - it hasn't moved. So my earlier reading was wrong. Let me re-examine:
- Node 88: pixels=69, boundary=[[51, 34], [51, 38], [53, 40], [57, 40], [59, 38], [59, 34], [57, 32], [53, 32]] - this is the blue blob, still at the same position
- Node 1: pixels=60, boundary=[[1, 1], [1, 60]] - the top blue bar, shrank from 61 to 60
So the only real change from clicking the blue blob was:
1. The top blue bar shrank by 1 (from 61 to 60 pixels) - this is the timer/step counter
2. The checkerboard pattern shifted/inverted (the B and c blocks swapped positions)
Wait, but the button area and bottom area look unchanged. Let me look at the checkerboard more carefully to see if the yellow objects moved.
The yellow objects are still at the same boundaries:
- Node 17: boundary=[[13, 30], [13, 33], [16, 33], [15, 32], [15, 31], [16, 30]] - same as before
- Node 63: boundary=[[33, 29], [36, 29], [37, 30], [36, 31], [36, 32], [37, 33], [36, 34], [33, 34], [37, 34], [37, 29]] - same as before
So the yellow objects stayed in place. The checkerboard pattern shifted around them.
This means clicking on the blue blob causes the checkerboard to shift/invert but doesn't change the yellow objects' positions. The timer decreases by 1.
Let me think about what the game might be. The yellow objects look like U-shapes. The buttons below have black and gray colors. Maybe I need to click on the yellow objects or the buttons to do something meaningful.
Let me try clicking on one of the yellow objects to see what happens. The top yellow object is at approximately row 14, col 31.

World model: Level 1 has a checkerboard with two yellow U-shaped objects, button slots below, and a blue oval blob at bottom. Clicking the blue blob shifts the checkerboard pattern and decrements the timer bar. Yellow objects stay in place.
Goal model: Unknown - need to figure out what clicking on other elements does.
Plan: Try clicking on the top yellow U-shaped object to see if it interacts differently.
